character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A weakened man recovering from illness, recently confined to bed but still defiant. Claims to have been first mate to old Flint and knows the location of a treasure. References a 'black spot' as a summons.

character_dossiers.name: Jim
character_dossiers.biography: A young man caring for his ailing father and the captain. Engages in dialogue with the captain and reports on his condition.

character_dossiers.name: the doctor
character_dossiers.biography: A physician who treated the captain. Left after the narrator's father died, leaving the captain without medical care.

character_dossiers.name: Black Dog
character_dossiers.biography: A seafaring man described as 'bad' by the captain. Implied to be involved in the captain's past conflicts.

character_dossiers.name: the seafaring man with one leg
character_dossiers.biography: A figure mentioned by the captain as someone worse than Black Dog. Described as a seafaring man with one leg.
